intro.label: 1_intro_C.mp4
intro.subtitle: Hi, my name is Emily and today we'll be conducting your job interview together. Please make yourself comfortable.

q1_video.label: 2_Q1_interested_in.mp4
q1_video.subtitle: What is the position you are interested in?

q2_video.label: 3_Q2_academic_background.mp4
q2_video.subtitle: Let's start by talking about your academic background. What is your major?

q3_video.label: 4_Q3_responsibilities_Good.mp4
q3_video.subtitle: Tell me about some responsibilities you have had at school, work or during internships.

q4_video.label: 5_Q4_activities.mp4
q4_video.subtitle: What activities are you interested in doing outside of school or work?

q5_video.label: 6_Q5_good_at.mp4
q5_video.subtitle: What are you good at and what skills do you feel confident about using in a professional environment?

q6_video.label: 7_Q6_teamwork_C.mp4
q6_video.subtitle: Have you ever worked on a project that required teamwork? Tell me what you have done.

q7_video.label: 8_Q7_tasks.mp4
q7_video.subtitle: What kind of tasks are you capable of doing independently?

finish.label: 30_wonderful_day.mp4
finish.subtitle: Thank you very much for your time today, it was a pleasure speaking with you and we'll be in touch. Have a wonderful day.

profanity_warning.label: 26_be_respectful.mp4
profanity_warning.subtitle: Please use respectful language during the interview. Let's return to the interview questions.

english_warning.label: 40_english.mp4
english_warning.subtitle: Oh, would you mind saying it in English?

english_practice.label: 41_no_spanish.mp4
english_practice.subtitle: I do understand Spanish, but you are here to practice English language!

off_topic_1.label: 42_off_topic_1.mp4
off_topic_1.subtitle: We can come back later to that topic. For now let's focus on the main objective, please.

off_topic_2.label: 43_off_topic_2.mp4
off_topic_2.subtitle: That's an interesting topic. For now let's focus on the main objective, please.

interviewFlow.title: Emily Interview Coach - Seven Question Flow

questions.question: What is the position you are interested in?
questions.hint: Mention a job or professional area using a complete sentence.
questions.caption: What is the position you are interested in?
questions.modelingAnswer: I am interested in working as a legal advisor.
questions.placeholder: Example: I am interested in working as a legal advisor.
questions.audio: What is the position you are interested in?

acceptablePatterns: i would like to work as

questions.question: What is your major?
questions.hint: Say what you study and mention your academic area.
questions.caption: Let's start by talking about your academic background. What is your major?
questions.placeholder: Example: I am studying Business Administration.
questions.audio: Let's start by talking about your academic background. What is your major?

questions.question: Tell me about some responsibilities you have had at school, work or during internships.
questions.hint: Mention one or two responsibilities using past or present perfect.
questions.caption: Tell me about some responsibilities you have had at school, work or during internships.
questions.modelingAnswer: I have prepared reports and organized documents for school projects.
questions.placeholder: Example: I have prepared reports and organized documents.
questions.audio: Tell me about some responsibilities you have had at school, work or during internships.

questions.question: What activities are you interested in doing outside of school or work?
questions.hint: Mention activities, hobbies or personal interests.
questions.caption: What activities are you interested in doing outside of school or work?
questions.modelingAnswer: I am interested in exercising, reading and learning new skills.
questions.placeholder: Example: I am interested in exercising and reading.
questions.audio: What activities are you interested in doing outside of school or work?

questions.question: What are you good at and what skills do you feel confident about using in a professional environment?
questions.hint: Mention one or two strengths related to work.
questions.caption: What are you good at and what skills do you feel confident about using in a professional environment?
questions.modelingAnswer: I am good at organizing information and communicating with people.
questions.placeholder: Example: I am good at organizing information and solving problems.
questions.audio: What are you good at and what skills do you feel confident about using in a professional environment?

questions.question: Have you ever worked on a project that required teamwork? Tell me what you have done.
questions.hint: Describe a team project and your role.
questions.caption: Have you ever worked on a project that required teamwork? Tell me what you have done.
questions.modelingAnswer: Yes, I have worked with classmates on a project, and I helped organize the information.
questions.placeholder: Example: Yes, I have worked with a team, and I helped organize the information.
questions.audio: Have you ever worked on a project that required teamwork? Tell me what you have done.

questions.question: What kind of tasks are you capable of doing independently?
questions.hint: Mention tasks you can do without constant supervision.
questions.caption: What kind of tasks are you capable of doing independently?
questions.modelingAnswer: I am capable of preparing reports, organizing files and following instructions independently.
questions.placeholder: Example: I am capable of preparing reports independently.
questions.audio: What kind of tasks are you capable of doing independently?

escalation.statusText: Let's focus on the interview question.
Please return to the interview objective.
Final warning. Please answer the question.

offTopic.terminationMessage: Alright, I am stopping the interview here. This session is officially over.

empty_answer.statusText: Please write or say your answer.

too_short.statusText: Please answer with a complete sentence.
